operational_knowledge_units.title: SorterSideDatabaseModel defines sorter legs and associated queue and status fields
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the SorterSideDatabaseModel defines the legs of the sorter. The table includes each sorter side's entrance and exit queue locations, the tipper count, and whether the sorter side is disabled.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Robotics Database / Sorter Side Database Model'
Visible text: 'The SorterSideDatabaseModel defines the legs of the sorter.'
Visible text: 'The table includes the enterance and exit queue locations of each soterside, as well as the tipper count and whether the sorterside is disabled or not.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: SorterSideDatabaseModel database table reference for robotics database. Defines sorter legs or sorter sides. Includes entrance queue location, exit queue location, tipper count, and disabled status for each sorter side.
